name: Style Performance Report
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can evaluate sales success at the product style level by accessing the Style Performance Report, which aggregates sales data across all variants within a style family. This style-level analysis helps retail operators assess overall style success beyond individual SKU performance, informing decisions about style continuation, reordering, and new style selection for future seasons."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Using the Style Performance Report helps retail operators identify winning style concepts for repeat orders, discontinue underperforming styles, and develop future assortment strategies based on style-level customer preferences and sales trends."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Style Performance Report provides summary sales information, grouped by Style Code. View sales quantities, value and GP; current stock quantities and order quantities; and sell through calculations.  This report is recommended as a supplement to the "}, {"text": "Stock Sales Matrix by Colour"}, {"text": " when more detail is required."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000ppiEnEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": report"}], "data-id": "criteria-for-products-to-appear-on-the-report"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For a product to be grouped by Style Code, each product in the group must share following attributes:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Matching Manufacturer SKU/Style Code (e.g. shoe123, shirtxyz)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Matching Brand"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Matching Supplier"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Size (if Size is not applicable to your products, create a Size called N/A and assign it to each of your products)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Colour (if Colour is not applicable to your products, create a Colour called N/A and assign it to each of your products)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Products grouped together by Manufacturer SKU are synchronised together as groups to various web stores, including Shopify (known as \"Variable Products\")."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Using the Style "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > Product Performance > Style Performance Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", Valid PLU codes are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Supplier SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Manufacturer SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product ID"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Enter multiple codes separated by a comma"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Product Name. You can enter a partial description, although it will search for that exact match within the names e.g. searching for \"9ct Silver\" would find \"Pendant - "}, {"text": "9ct Silver", "italic": true}, {"text": "\" but wouldn't find \"9ct Yellow Gold Silver Bracelet\"."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exclude Zero Stock Units and\u00a0Exclude Below Zero\u00a0Stock Units"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exclude products if the product currently has zero stock available i.e. even if sales have occurred during the period the product will still be excluded from the report"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-4fe3a6bb"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
